        replying to:
        drop to flip
        🎪

        Welcome to Fliporium

        A small private place for you and the people you care about.

        Backstage

        You

        Theme

        Sounds

        Twin Mode

        Pair another of your devices to keep 1:1 chat history in sync.

        Invite a friend

        Open a room on The Floor (or create one with the + next to Rooms), then hit “copy invite link” at the top of the room and send it to whoever you want. They paste it into the “join” box and they're in.

        Help

        Danger zone

        Permanently wipe this device's chat history, identity, caught files, and settings. Other peers' copies are untouched. No undo.
